name: tutorial-writer
description: Produce long-form technical tutorials in the house style — feature-named chapters, user-first prose, single-file HTML with chalkboard code, progressive illustrations, ambient microinteractions. Reverse-engineered from the kindaVim Tutor walkthrough.
author: Tutorial system extracted from the kindaVim Tutor project

invoke_when: user asks to write a tutorial
user asks to produce a walkthrough
user asks to revise a tutorial draft
user asks for a kindaVim-style tutorial for another project

optional_tools: shiki CDN (for syntax highlighting in the output HTML)

portability.repo_assumptions: none — copy the whole plugin directory into any repo and it works. Paths inside the plugin are relative.
portability.output_location: By default emits docs/tutorial.html + assets in docs/. Ask the user if they want a different output path.

changelog.notes: Initial extraction from the kindaVim Tutor walkthrough.
